descriptionText: Tecnnomar 63 For Sale 2021| Guest Cabins:2| Crew Cabins:2For buyers looking for a high‑performance yacht with a distinctive style, this Tecnnomar 63 For Sale 2021 offers a rare opportunity to acquire a model built in limited numbers and well known for its collaboration with Lamborghini. Delivered in 2021 and currently located in Europe, she is in good condition and retains the unique characteristics that set the Tecnomar Lamborghini 63 apart from other performance yachts in her size range.Below is a summary of her main specifications:• Brand: Tecnomar • Year: 2021 • Length: 20 m • Max Beam: 5.4 m • Construction: FRP • Draught: 1.6 m • Yacht Location: Europe • Max Speed: 63 knots • Fuel Tank: 3,600 l • Water Tank: 600 l • Guest Cabins: 2 • Crew Cabins: 2 • Engines: 2 x MAN V12 2000 HPThe concept behind the Tecnomar Lamborghini 63 is rooted in automotive inspiration. Created as a tribute to the Lamborghini brand, the yacht incorporates the signature design elements, sharp geometry and innovative engineering typically associated with the Italian supercar manufacturer. The partnership between Tecnomar and Lamborghini has resulted in a yacht that places emphasis on speed, weight reduction and dynamic styling. With an exterior silhouette created by Centro Stile and influenced by Marcello Gandini’s work on the Miura and Countach of the 1960s and 1970s, she stands out with a profile that is both angular and purposeful.Her performance capability is one of her defining attributes. Powered by twin MAN V12 2000 HP engines, she can reach up to 63 knots, making her one of the fastest yachts in her class. The use of carbon fibre plays a crucial role in achieving such performance, helping the boat remain within the ultralight category with a total weight of around 24 tonnes for a length of 63 feet. This focus on lightweight construction, paired with hull design optimised for speed, gives her a driving experience that feels closely aligned with her Lamborghini heritage.The interior of Tecnnomar 63 For Sale 2021 carries through the same philosophy of performance blended with contemporary Italian craftsmanship. High‑tech materials are used throughout, not only for aesthetic value but also to contribute to weight optimisation and functional efficiency. Hexagonal motifs, clean lines and colour accents inspired by Lamborghini interiors give the living areas a recognisable identity while remaining practical for regular onboard use. The accommodation layout is arranged to suit both day cruising and overnight trips, offering two cabins for up to four sleeping guests. These include a master cabin and a twin cabin, both presented with thoughtful design and attention to ergonomic comfort. During the day, the yacht can host up to 12 guests for cruising, making her suitable for social outings and short coastal adventures.Outdoor spaces are another highlight, with lounging and sunbathing areas positioned to make the best use of the deck layout. The exterior lines match the sharp, sporty look of the yacht, but the spaces themselves are arranged for relaxed use, offering a balance between performance styling and day‑to‑day practicality.Overall, this Tecnnomar 63 For Sale 2021 offers a distinctive blend of performance, design and condition, suitable for buyers seeking a fast and stylistically bold yacht.
descriptionHtml:
Tecnnomar 63 For Sale 2021| Guest Cabins:2| Crew Cabins:2

For buyers looking for a high‑performance yacht with a distinctive style, this Tecnnomar 63 For Sale 2021 offers a rare opportunity to acquire a model built in limited numbers and well known for its collaboration with Lamborghini. Delivered in 2021 and currently located in Europe, she is in good condition and retains the unique characteristics that set the Tecnomar Lamborghini 63 apart from other performance yachts in her size range.

Below is a summary of her main specifications:

• Brand: Tecnomar
• Year: 2021
• Length: 20 m
• Max Beam: 5.4 m
• Construction: FRP
• Draught: 1.6 m
• Yacht Location: Europe
• Max Speed: 63 knots
• Fuel Tank: 3,600 l
• Water Tank: 600 l
• Guest Cabins: 2
• Crew Cabins: 2
• Engines: 2 x MAN V12 2000 HP

The concept behind the Tecnomar Lamborghini 63 is rooted in automotive inspiration. Created as a tribute to the Lamborghini brand, the yacht incorporates the signature design elements, sharp geometry and innovative engineering typically associated with the Italian supercar manufacturer. The partnership between Tecnomar and Lamborghini has resulted in a yacht that places emphasis on speed, weight reduction and dynamic styling. With an exterior silhouette created by Centro Stile and influenced by Marcello Gandini’s work on the Miura and Countach of the 1960s and 1970s, she stands out with a profile that is both angular and purposeful.

Her performance capability is one of her defining attributes. Powered by twin MAN V12 2000 HP engines, she can reach up to 63 knots, making her one of the fastest yachts in her class. The use of carbon fibre plays a crucial role in achieving such performance, helping the boat remain within the ultralight category with a total weight of around 24 tonnes for a length of 63 feet. This focus on lightweight construction, paired with hull design optimised for speed, gives her a driving experience that feels closely aligned with her Lamborghini heritage.

The interior of Tecnnomar 63 For Sale 2021 carries through the same philosophy of performance blended with contemporary Italian craftsmanship. High‑tech materials are used throughout, not only for aesthetic value but also to contribute to weight optimisation and functional efficiency. Hexagonal motifs, clean lines and colour accents inspired by Lamborghini interiors give the living areas a recognisable identity while remaining practical for regular onboard use. The accommodation layout is arranged to suit both day cruising and overnight trips, offering two cabins for up to four sleeping guests. These include a master cabin and a twin cabin, both presented with thoughtful design and attention to ergonomic comfort. During the day, the yacht can host up to 12 guests for cruising, making her suitable for social outings and short coastal adventures.

Outdoor spaces are another highlight, with lounging and sunbathing areas positioned to make the best use of the deck layout. The exterior lines match the sharp, sporty look of the yacht, but the spaces themselves are arranged for relaxed use, offering a balance between performance styling and day‑to‑day practicality.

Overall, this Tecnnomar 63 For Sale 2021 offers a distinctive blend of performance, design and condition, suitable for buyers seeking a fast and stylistically bold yacht.
